name: Workplace Dispute Case
history: Past labor dispute in a previous workplace. Ongoing concerns related to fairness, pay, and authority at work.
intermediate_belief: I must ensure fairness and authority are respected to feel secure.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't ensure fairness, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Overanalyzing work situations to find fairness and authority issues.
situation: Reflecting on a work-related case and the response of a businessman involved.
auto_thought: This businessman is not treating the situation fairly.
behavior: Ruminating over the fairness of the situation and questioning authority.
